sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102921" key="tele/arxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελέαρχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<sense id="n102921.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τέλος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">police magistrate at Thebes</tr_>, originally in charge of street-cleaning, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.811b</biblScope> </bibl>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελεαρχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">his office</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
